_comment: Regression test baseline. Updated by the regression-tester agent. Each key is a test name, value is {status, last_run, notes}.

pepper connects.notes: ping returns pong, look returns screen data with 17 interactive elements

look returns elements.notes: 17 interactive, 12 text elements on Controls tab

tap by text.notes: Tapped List tab, screen changed from Controls to List view with items

back navigation.notes: Navigated back from Item 0 detail to List tab. Fix confirmed in #778/#780.

input text into field.notes: Text field shows 'test input 123' after input command

scroll down.notes: Scrolled 200pt on List tab, content shifted from Item 0 to Item 2, element count increased from 15 to 20

scroll to element.notes: scroll --element 'Item 40' returns 'Element not found'; does not seek off-screen elements

scroll to element (deprecated scroll_to).notes: scroll_to command caused app crash (WebSocket connection lost: timed out)

look scope filtering.notes: scope parameter does not filter output; returns all 18 elements regardless of container

look compact mode.notes: Second compact call returns full output, not diff

find by predicate.notes: 27 matches for type == 'button', all correct type

read element properties.notes: read command requires accessibility ID; test app elements lack explicit accessibility identifiers

screen name.notes: Returns screen_id, tab info (3 tabs), navigation stack, can_go_back

appearance toggle.notes: dark and light modes switched cleanly, both returned mode confirmation

network monitoring.notes: Captured 1 HTTP transaction (status 200) after tapping Fetch HTTP; start/log/stop all succeeded

console capture.notes: start/log/stop succeeded; 0 lines captured (test app doesn't log, but functional flow works)

timeline flight recorder.notes: Returned 100 events including screen transitions and commands

vars inspect.notes: AppState instance with tapCount/totalTaps properties returned

snapshot save and diff.notes: Save captured 18 elements/11 texts. After tapping Tap Me, diff correctly showed Count: 1 → Count: 2.

look on empty screen.notes: Returns without error on Controls tab, 18 interactive elements

tap nonexistent element.notes: Returns 'Element not found by text' error with clear message, no crash
